archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Military Esports Variant)

headings.usage: Page titles, section headers, prominent numbers, buttons.

body.usage: Standard UI text, descriptions, standard labels.

data.usage: Time slots (e.g. 00:40), tokens remaining, dates, and grid data.

grid_planning_and_availability.structure: Grid of 36 rows (time slots) x 7 columns (Monday - Sunday)
grid_planning_and_availability.time_intervals: 40-minute increments starting at 00:00 (00:00, 00:40, 01:20, 02:00, 02:40, etc., up to 23:20)
grid_planning_and_availability.time_column: Sticky left column (`sticky left-0 z-20`) showing times.
grid_planning_and_availability.header_row: Sticky top row (`sticky top-0 z-30`) showing days of the week + week navigation (prev/next).
grid_planning_and_availability.cell_style: Compact density (`h-10` or `h-12` minimum height). Technical grid look using `border-r border-b border-[#1F2937]`. Must include hover state (`hover:bg-[#1B221B]`).

navigation.style: Top header with user info, current week toggle, and logout.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7A8B42] text-white hover:bg-[#8C9E4D] rounded-sm font-rajdhani uppercase tracking-wider transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(122,139,66,0.15)]
buttons.outline: border border-[#7A8B42] text-[#A3C139] hover:bg-[#7A8B42]/10 rounded-sm font-rajdhani uppercase tracking-wider

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0D0A] border border-[#27272A] text-white focus:border-[#7A8B42] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#7A8B42] rounded-sm font-chivo placeholder-zinc-600

badges.style: px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-jetbrains uppercase tracking-widest border rounded-sm

animations.interactions: Micro-interactions for feedback. Rapid transitions (0.15s ease) for a snappy, tactical gaming feel. No slow floating animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React/Firebase dashboard tailored for an esports team. Login page must feature the 'background_login' image with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60) and center the 'logo_veterans'.
Install and import 'Rajdhani', 'Chivo', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts or fontsource.
Implement 3 primary routes post-login: 1. Planning (Admin Only Edit), 2. Disponibilité (User Edit), 3. Eva Pass (Data Table).

Grid Implementation is Critical: Create a 36-row x 7-column grid structure for both Planning and Availability. Ensure columns map to Mon-Sun. Rows correspond to 40-minute slots starting from 00:00. Use fixed headers for days and a fixed left column for time labels.

For Planning Cells: Create a dropdown or click-to-edit modal for Admins allowing them to select 1 of the 7 session types. The cell background and border must perfectly reflect the selected 'semantic.planning_sessions' styling.
For Availability Cells: Allow users to toggle between 'Disponible', 'Indisponible', and 'Incertain'. Unfilled states should remain blank dark cells. Use the defined 'semantic.availability' stylings.
For Eva Pass Page: Build a dense data table using Shadcn Table component. Show user name, tokens remaining, and next reset date. Ensure table rows use hover effects (hover:bg-[#1B221B]).
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for UI adornments (e.g., arrow keys for week navigation, logout icon, user avatar).
All interactive inputs, buttons, and grid cells MUST have corresponding `data-testid` attributes.
